api_key_vault_note: Saving a key here only stores it for use by services; it does not select or activate a provider. Choose the active service profile in the control dashboard.
islamic_mode_hint:
Quran verse & Athan recognition and Islamic translation style. 
 Off = general translator for any content.
islamic_mode_off_confirm: Turn off Islamic mode? Quran verse recognition, Athan detection and the Islamic translation style will be disabled — the app becomes a general translator.
subtitle_screen_none_help: No subtitle window will open; the session can still run.
announce_no_screen_message: Select a screen under Output window to show the announcement.
dlg_enter_key: Enter a new OpenAI API key
dlg_key_saved_insecure: API key saved (stored in settings file, not keyring).
dlg_key_insecure_warning: Keyring unavailable — key will be stored unencrypted.
dlg_key_saved_session_only: No keyring available — the key works for this session only and must be entered again after a restart.
dlg_stop_before_remove: Stop the app before removing the key.
strategy_help_realtime: Speech is recognised continuously; the original text can appear while someone is speaking and the translation follows after each completed utterance. Best for live sermons and events where subtitles should appear as early as possible.
strategy_help_semantic: Several audio sections are collected and translated together, preferably as a complete sentence. Best for connected talks where complete sentences matter more than the fastest display.
strategy_help_chunk: Speech is split into fixed time sections and translated one section at a time. Best for calm talks where a few seconds of delay are acceptable.
subtitle_help_realtime: Finished translations build from top to bottom; the currently recognised original text can appear below them. Best for following a live sermon directly. Available only with Real-time streaming.
subtitle_help_continuous: Finished subtitles move through the window from bottom to top, so older lines remain visible briefly. Best for longer sermons and talks.
subtitle_help_static: Only the latest finished subtitle remains visible; the previous one is replaced. Best for a calm projector or OBS overlay without a moving text trail.
auto_stop_inactivity: Stop automatically after 10 min without speech
already_running_body:
MinbarLive is already running or is currently starting up!

Unless you meant to do this, please shut down the existing instance before starting a new one.
wizard_ui_language_sub: Language of the control panel (subtitles use their own setting).
wizard_audio_sub: Choose the audio input used for the live translation.
wizard_no_devices: No input devices found — you can choose one later in the control panel.
wizard_keys_info: Add keys for as many providers as you like by switching the list above. With Google Gemini (the default), one key covers both translation and real-time transcription.
wizard_gemini_rag_note: Quran verse detection uses OpenAI embeddings. Without an OpenAI key, verse matching is disabled.
wizard_anthropic_stt_note: Claude has no speech-to-text — transcription runs on OpenAI, so an OpenAI key is also required.
wizard_key_saved_hint: A key is already saved — leave empty to keep it.
wizard_key_help: Where do I get an API key?
batch_file_sub: Create translated subtitles (.srt) from a recording
batch_ffmpeg_missing: ffmpeg not found — install ffmpeg to process this file format.
batch_ffmpeg_download_prompt: ffmpeg is required to convert this file format. Download it now? (one time, ~{mb} MB)
announce_sub: Show a message big on the subtitle screen
announce_favorites_full: You can pin up to {max} favorites. Remove one before adding another.
history_delete_confirm:
Delete this history file?
This cannot be undone.
wizard_disclaimer_text: MinbarLive uses artificial intelligence to transcribe and translate speech in real time. AI translations can be wrong, incomplete or inaccurate — especially for religious content. The audio is sent to the selected AI provider for processing. Do not rely on the subtitles as an authoritative religious source.
wizard_disclaimer_accept: I understand that AI translations can be inaccurate.
v3_microphone_open_failed: The microphone could not be opened. Reconnect it or choose another input device.
v3_key_rejected_detail: Key rejected by {provider}. Replace the {provider} key.
v3_fatal_recognition_error: Speech recognition stopped because the service rejected the connection.
v3_cost_note: USD Standard rate · invoice may differ
history_cost_notice: Paid Standard USD list price; free tier, discounts and taxes can differ.
history_cost_delete_confirm:
Delete this cost record?
This cannot be undone.
